Human Resource / Admin Job at Bricks and Builders Properties




        
    

        
        Bricks and Builders Properties - We help you Find More Than a House — A Place to Call Home in the real estate market, we're into property management, land sales etc

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resource / Admin

Job Location:  Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Recruitment, training and on-boarding of staff, workforce planning and administration,payroll planning etc.


Salary
N150,000 per month. 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Accounts Officer",
  "description": "Eromedix Technologies is a company incorporated in 1996 to provide quality support to healthcare facilities through the supplies of Medical Diagnostic Equipment, consumables, maintenance services, training, delivery services, leadership and healthcare development. We have our head office in Rivers state, Imo state and Akwa Ibom state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounts Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	Are you detail-oriented, trustworthy, and passionate about numbers?
	Eromedix Technologies is looking for a smart and reliable Accounts Officer to join our growing team!


Key Requirements


	OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	Experience in accounting or finance role is an added advantage
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel &amp; accounting software
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Honest, organized, and dependable
	Professional attitude &amp; good communication skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Salary
Attractive &amp; Competitive.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV&nbsp;and a brief cover letter to:&nbsp;eromedixconcepts@yahoo.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	For further enquiries send message to: 09070383220.

Accounts Officer Job at Eromedix Technologies




        
    

        
        Eromedix Technologies is a company incorporated in 1996 to provide quality support to healthcare facilities through the supplies of Medical Diagnostic Equipment, consumables, maintenance services, training, delivery services, leadership and healthcare development. We have our head office in Rivers state, Imo state and Akwa Ibom state.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounts Officer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Are you detail-oriented, trustworthy, and passionate about numbers?
	Eromedix Technologies is looking for a smart and reliable Accounts Officer to join our growing team!


Key Requirements


	OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	Experience in accounting or finance role is an added advantage
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel & accounting software
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Honest, organized, and dependable
	Professional attitude & good communication skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Salary
Attractive & Competitive.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	For further enquiries send message to: 09070383220.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "NIMOJEN Group Limited is a dynamic conglomerate dedicated to delivering efficient and cost-effective solutions across a wide range of industries. Established with a commitment to excellence, NIMOJEN Group Limited has swiftly emerged as a versatile force in the business world, with a strong presence in various sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki&ndash;Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Accountant to join our finance team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards, and supporting the organization&rsquo;s financial decision-making processes.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and reports
	Manage accounts payable and receivable functions
	Perform bank reconciliations and general ledger maintenance
	Assist in budget preparation and financial forecasting
	Ensure compliance with statutory requirements and tax regulations
	Support internal and external audit processes
	Monitor financial transactions and identify discrepancies
	Provide financial insights to support business decisions


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant work experience
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting standards
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail
	Candidates should residein or around Lekki Ajah axis.


Added Advantage:


	
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent).
	


Benefits
Salary is negotiable.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to:&nbsp;career@nimojengroup.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Accountant &ndash; Lekki Ajah&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at all levels of the organization.",

Accountant Job at NIMOJEN Group Limited




        
    

        
        NIMOJEN Group Limited is a dynamic conglomerate dedicated to delivering efficient and cost-effective solutions across a wide range of industries. Established with a commitment to excellence, NIMOJEN Group Limited has swiftly emerged as a versatile force in the business world, with a strong presence in various sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lekki–Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Accountant to join our finance team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring compliance with regulatory standards, and supporting the organization’s financial decision-making processes.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and reports
	Manage accounts payable and receivable functions
	Perform bank reconciliations and general ledger maintenance
	Assist in budget preparation and financial forecasting
	Ensure compliance with statutory requirements and tax regulations
	Support internal and external audit processes
	Monitor financial transactions and identify discrepancies
	Provide financial insights to support business decisions


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant work experience
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting standards
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail
	Candidates should residein or around Lekki Ajah axis.


Added Advantage:


	
	Professional certification (ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent).
	


Benefits
Salary is negotiable.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Accountant – Lekki Ajah” as the subject of the email.

Note: We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at all levels of the organization.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Procurement Lead",
  "description": "NIMOJEN Group Limited is a dynamic conglomerate dedicated to delivering efficient and cost-effective solutions across a wide range of industries. Established with a commitment to excellence, NIMOJEN Group Limited has swiftly emerged as a versatile force in the business world, with a strong presence in various sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Lead

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki / Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Procurement Lead will be responsible for managing the sourcing, purchasing, and supply chain activities of the organization.
	The role requires strong negotiation skills, vendor management expertise, and the ability to drive cost efficiency while maintaining quality standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with business objectives
	Source, evaluate, and manage relationships with vendors and suppliers
	Negotiate contracts, pricing, and terms to achieve cost savings
	Oversee purchasing activities and ensure timely delivery of goods and services
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with relevant departments
	Ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements
	Analyze market trends and identify potential risks and opportunities
	Lead and mentor the procurement team to achieve departmental goals


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Procurement, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field
	Minimum of 5 years&rsquo; relevant experience in procurement or supply chain management
	Strong negotiation and contract management skills.
	Proven experience in vendor sourcing and relationship management
	Excellent analytical, organizational, and leadership abilities
	Proficiency in procurement software and Microsoft Office tools


Added Advantage


	
	Professional certification (CIPS, CPSM, or equivalent).
	


Location Requirement:


	Candidates should residein or around Lekki&ndash;Ajah axis.


Salary is negiotable.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV and a cover letter to&nbsp;career@nimojengroup.com&nbsp;using &quot;Procurement Lead, Lekki Ajah&quot; as the subject of the mail.

	The Procurement Lead will be responsible for managing the sourcing, purchasing, and supply chain activities of the organization.
	The role requires strong negotiation skills, vendor management expertise, and the ability to drive cost efficiency while maintaining quality standards.

	Source, evaluate, and manage relationships with vendors and suppliers
